name: garlic powder
note: Garlic can damage red blood cells in dogs and cats.

name: onion
note: Onions are toxic and may cause gastrointestinal upset and anemia.

name: xylitol
note: Xylitol can cause dangerous blood sugar drops, especially in dogs.

name: salt
note: High salt content can worsen dehydration and stomach upset.

name: chocolate
note: Chocolate contains methylxanthines that are toxic to pets.
